corrections.note: Image reads τεθερισμένα; transcript has τεθερισμένα with an extra tau after τε.

corrections.location: Judith 4:8, line break at end of verse 8
corrections.note: Printed form is ἐκάθιντο, not ἐκάθηντο.
Body lemma on page is Βαιλμὰν/Βαιλμαν; transcription's apparatus entry is otherwise correct. No change needed here.
The image reads Bᵃ, not Bᵇ, before the parenthesis.
The first siglum is the printed kappa-form used here, not ℵ; image is slightly cramped.
The image shows Bᵃᵇ, not Bᵃ?.

uncertain.note: The siglum sequence after 'pr και' is cramped; transcript reads 'ℵ* ℵA', image may need closer inspection to confirm exact superscripts/spacing.

notes: Running head matches. Most body text is correct. Apparatus largely matches, but there are a few siglum/superscript decoding issues. One drafted apparatus correction was inspected and found correct as transcribed; no change required there.
